summary: This Excel spreadsheet presents a competitive analysis matrix used for CE Marking regulatory submissions, comparing four existing medical software solutions against the startup's proposed device. It details MDR Class I classifications and contrasts features such as voice interaction, data integration, and user interface requirements. The document highlights unique value propositions to justify the new product's market positioning in the UK.
